title: Support horticultural crop harvesting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support horticultural crop harvesting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for harvest

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Recognise workplace hazards and report safety concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise workplace hazards and report safety concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise workplace hazards and report safety concerns.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task and workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task and workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task and workplace safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for harvest

elements.title: Harvest the crop

pcs.text: Estimate readiness of crop for picking according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate readiness of crop for picking according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate readiness of crop for picking according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Apply harvesting processes that minimise crop damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply harvesting processes that minimise crop damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply harvesting processes that minimise crop damage.

pcs.text: Carry out basic sorting and grading according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out basic sorting and grading according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out basic sorting and grading according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain harvesting tools, equipment and machinery according to industry standards.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report harvesting problems to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report harvesting problems to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Harvest the crop

elements.title: Transport the crop

pcs.text: Use safe manual handling when handling containers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe manual handling when handling containers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe manual handling when handling containers.

pcs.text: Move and stack containers to minimise damage to the crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move and stack containers to minimise damage to the crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move and stack containers to minimise damage to the crop.

pcs.text: Maintain temperature of the harvested crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain temperature of the harvested crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain temperature of the harvested crop.

pcs.text: Transport harvested crop to the processing or storage area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport harvested crop to the processing or storage area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport harvested crop to the processing or storage area.

pcs.text: Maintain containers in good working order according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain containers in good working order according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain containers in good working order according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Transport the crop

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
